expectations.text: Runs the bundled checker in audit mode against globals.css
Reports results for BOTH light and dark themes
expectations.evidence: Light failures + dark passing noted per token.

expectations.text: Cites the correct AA thresholds (4.5:1 text, 3:1 large/non-text)
Flags at least the genuine failures (e.g. muted-foreground light, sidebar-primary-foreground)
expectations.evidence: muted-foreground, sidebar-primary-foreground, input, rings — AND now info/success/warning status colors (the iteration-1 gap, fixed).

expectations.text: Applies interpretation rather than blindly listing every fail
expectations.evidence: Decorative-border exemption, large-text caveat, 1.4.1, and cross-referenced real component usage (text-success on bg-success/10).

expectations.text: Does not edit any token values (audit was read-only request)

notes: FIX VALIDATED: status colors now surface (info 3.60 / success 3.30 / warning 3.19), which the iteration-1 with-skill run missed.
